dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses daily pivot levels (pivot and s1 available). Entry: stock opens below pivot AND stays above S1 (low > s1) AND shows upward attempt (close > open for intraday retracement recovery). Exit: when price breaks below first support S1, indicating failed reversal attempt. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% to protect against gap downs below S1.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses daily pivot levels (pivot and s1 available). Entry: stock opens below pivot AND stays above S1 (low > s1) AND shows upward attempt (close > open for intraday retracement recovery). Exit: when price breaks below first support S1, indicating failed reversal attempt. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% to protect against gap downs below S1.

source_rule_text: Do not reject a stock that opens below the daily pivot or CPR if it stays above first support S1; consider it for a buy when it attempts to move higher on intraday retracements.
